text: Well, hi there!  This is Aaron from The Voices of Liberty!
We really wish we could be with you in Epcot at Walt Disney World, right now...
and we thought using our Voices from Home to sing for you again is a great way to stay in touch!
Because, that's just what friends do!
♪YOU GOT A FRIEND IN ME
♪YOU GOT TROUBLES, I GOT 'EM TOO
♪THERE ISN'T ANYTHING I WOULDN'T DO FOR YOU
♪IF WE STICK TOGETHER WE CAN SEE IT THROUGH
♪'CAUSE YOU'VE GOT A FRIEND IN ME
♪YEAH YOU'VE GOT A FRIEND IN ME
♪MR ALADDIN SIR, WHAT WILL YOUR PLEASURE BE
♪LET ME TAKE YOUR ORDER, JOT IT DOWN,  YOU AIN'T NEVER HAD A FRIEND LIKE ME, NO NO NO
♪LIFE IS YOUR RESTAURANT AND WE ARE YOUR MAITRE D'
♪C'MON WHISPER WHAT IT IS YOU WANT YOU AIN'T NEVER HAD A FRIEND LIKE ME
♪MISTER ALADDIN, SIR, HAVE A WISH OR TWO OR THREE
♪WE'RE ON THE JOB, YOU BIG NABOB
♪YOU AIN'T NEVER HAD A FRIEND, NEVER HAD A FRIEND
♪YOU AIN'T NEVER HAD A FRIEND LIKE ME
♪YOU'VE GOT A FRIEND IN ME
♪YOU AIN'T NEVER HAD A FRIEND LIKE ME
Hey, that was fun!
We sure hope you enjoyed that!
All of your friends in the Voices of Liberty want you to know that we'll...
See ya' real soon!
